storyboard.content: I've been having severe burning pain every time I urinate — it's been going on for about a week and it's really bad.
I noticed blood in my urine. It's been there for the past week and it's really worrying me.
Last night I developed a high fever with chills — I was shaking and just felt awful. That's never happened before with this.
My lower back on the right side has been hurting really badly. It's a deep ache that won't go away.
I feel like I need to urinate every 30 minutes but when I go, barely anything comes out. It's really frustrating and uncomfortable.
The burning and blood in my urine started about 7 days ago. Everything got dramatically worse in the last 24 hours — that's when the fever and back pain kicked in.
The pain is at an 8 out of 10. I can barely sit still and I haven't been able to do anything normal today — I'm in real distress.
I'm a 42-year-old male and I don't have any major medical history. This came out of nowhere.
